component.name: Markpad
component.summary: Small native Markdown notepad with split view and version history

description.p: Markpad is a tiny native Markdown notepad built with Go and the system webview. No Electron, under 10 MB, fast startup.

ul.li: Split view: Editor, side-by-side split, and preview modes with resizable divider
Version history: every save creates a snapshot you can browse, preview, and restore
Session restore: all notes, drafts, and favorites survive app close
Formatting toolbar with bold, italic, headings, code, tables, lists, links, and more
Find in editor with wrap-around search
Auto-list continuation for bullets, numbered lists, and task lists
Open any text file: Markdown, plain text, JSON, YAML, Python, Go, JS, HTML, CSS, and more
Favorites, drag-and-drop reorder, file type icons, word count, reading time

description.p: Version history, auto-list continuation, external links open in browser, UX refinements.
